_comment: Force-update gate for Ewe File Manager. Bump version when changed.
_instructions: Set enabled true and minimumVersion above the live App Store build to block older installs. Replace appStoreURL with your real App Store link (https://apps.apple.com/app/idXXXXXXXX).
title: Update Required
message: A new version of Ewe File Manager is available. Tap Update to open the App Store and install the latest version.
